name: scoreProduct
label: Score Product
description: Extract product data and compute an AgentReady score (0-100) indicating how well-structured the data is for AI agent consumption. Cost: $0.02/call.

parameters.name: url
parameters.label: Product URL
parameters.help: The URL of the product page to extract and score

parameters.name: strict_confidence_threshold
parameters.label: Confidence Threshold
parameters.help: Fields below this confidence (0.0-1.0) will be scrubbed to null with explanation. Leave empty for all fields.
